name: Chilled Chicken Risotto Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours to allow flavors to blend.
3. Serve chilled or at room temperature, garnished with fresh basil and black olives if desired.
Makes 6 servings, each with 240 calories.
